context: Source: Video 2: Intro to Component Builder (11:27) + Video 3: Create an Asset Library with Megascans (11:10). Evolution: charmeleon. Constraints: Order of operations is CRITICAL: Generate Thumbnail -> Save to Disk -> Add to Asset Catalog. Do NOT skip or reorder.; The Asset Catalog is a UI pane opened via New Pane -> Solaris -> Asset Catalog.; Asset database must be created first (Gear icon -> Create New Asset Database File).
